title: DIMCP EP_25 season2 60$Ramen
archivePath: CRFW Archive/_Documentation/Videos/2018/Dog is my Copilot/DIMCP EP_25 season2 60$Ramen.mp4
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Welcome back to the show, Dog is my co-pilot.
[00:00:05.00] I hope you can hear me pretty good.
[00:00:08.00] We got some ramen.
[00:00:10.00] We got $60 worth of ramen here.
[00:00:13.00] That's a lot of ramen.
[00:00:16.00] Yeah.
[00:00:18.00] And a pork bun.
[00:00:20.00] So we're taking this two.
[00:00:26.00] We're taking this two.
[00:00:28.00] Rachel at Blue Saki Grill.
[00:00:30.00] Rachel at Blue Saki Grill, her name is Rachel and she works at a sushi restaurant.
[00:00:38.00] She really needs ramen right now.
[00:00:41.00] That's for sure.
[00:00:42.00] We got some guest dogs back here.
[00:00:44.00] Rindiana Jones and French Sheddle.
[00:00:48.00] Thanks for watching the show.
[00:00:54.00] We'll call back later.
